title: pseudabutilon benense
intro: Pseudabutilon benense, also known as the Benense False Abutilon, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from pain and swelling. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and herbal preparations may also involve crushing the leaves and mixing them with other ingredients to create a paste or poultice.
